originalTitle: Uber Technologies (UBER) Adds New Retailers to Uber Eats Marketplace
summary: Uber Technologies, Inc. (NYSE:UBER) is one of the 12 Most Profitable S&P 500 Stocks to Invest In. On June 24, 2026, Uber Technologies, Inc. (NYSE:UBER) announced the addition of several retailers to the Uber Eats marketplace, expanding the retail products available for on-demand delivery. Consumers can now shop from Kiehl’s, FedEx Office (FDX), Blick Art […]
content:
Uber Technologies, Inc. (NYSE:UBER) is one of the 12 Most Profitable S&P 500 Stocks to Invest In .

On June 24, 2026, Uber Technologies, Inc. (NYSE:UBER) announced the addition of several retailers to the Uber Eats marketplace, expanding the retail products available for on-demand delivery. Consumers can now shop from Kiehl's, FedEx Office (FDX), Blick Art Materials, Academy Sports + Outdoors (ASO), and Choice Pet through the Uber Eats, Uber, and Postmates apps.

On June 22, Lime, which operates an electric bike and scooter network, plans to name Uber as an anchor investor in its U.S. initial public offering, The Information's Cory Weinberg reported. Uber is expected to invest a "meaningful" amount in the deal and be named as an anchor investor on the cover of an updated IPO prospectus that Lime plans to file on Monday. On June 18, Life360 (LIF) and Uber launched the next phase of their strategic partnership, allowing Life360 members to request and coordinate Uber rides for teens and other family members directly within the Life360 app. The integration uses Uber Family's ride platform and safety features with Life360's real-time location sharing, letting parents request rides to a family member's real-time location and follow trip progress through Life360 or Uber. The integration was set to go live for Life360 members in select markets on June 18.

On June 17, Rothschild & Co Redburn lowered its price target on Uber to $112 from $120 and maintained a Buy rating. Rothschild & Co Redburn said autonomous vehicles will drive a "substantial expansion" in ride-hailing platforms' total addressable markets. The firm said Uber and Lyft are positioned to "remain the aggregators of ride-hailing demand," while also providing commercial and operational capabilities to fragmented autonomous vehicle suppliers. Rothschild & Co Redburn also sees "compelling value" in Uber shares at current levels.

Uber Technologies, Inc. (NYSE:UBER) develops and operates proprietary technology applications in the United States, Canada, Latin America, Europe, the Middle East, Africa, and the Asia Pacific.

While we acknowledge the potential of UBER as an investment, we believe certain AI stocks offer greater upside potential and carry less downside risk. chineseTitle: Uber Technologies (UBER) 为 Uber Eats 优食市场增加新零售商
chineseSummary: Uber Technologies, Inc.（纽约证券交易所股票代码：UBER）是标准普尔 500 指数中最值得投资的 12 只最赚钱股票之一。 2026 年 6 月 24 日，Uber Technologies, Inc.（纽约证券交易所代码：UBER）宣布在 Uber Eats 优食市场上新增多家零售商，扩大了可按需配送的零售产品。消费者现在可以从 Kiehl's、FedEx Office (FDX)、Blick Art 购物 [...]
chineseContent:
Uber Technologies, Inc.（纽约证券交易所股票代码：UBER）是标准普尔 500 指数中最值得投资的 12 只最赚钱股票之一。

2026 年 6 月 24 日，Uber Technologies, Inc.（纽约证券交易所代码：UBER）宣布在 Uber Eats 优食市场上新增多家零售商，扩大了可按需配送的零售产品。消费者现在可以通过 Uber Eats、Uber 和 Postmates 应用程序从 Kiehl's、FedEx Office (FDX)、Blick Art Materials、Academy Sports + Outdoors (ASO) 和 Choice Pet 购物。

据 The Information 的 Cory Weinberg 报道，6 月 22 日，运营电动自行车和踏板车网络的 Lime 计划任命 Uber 作为其美国首次公开募股的主要投资者。预计 Uber 将在此次交易中投资“有意义”的资金，并在 Lime 计划周一提交的最新 IPO 招股说明书的封面上被指定为主要投资者。 6 月 18 日，Life360 (LIF) 和 Uber 启动了下一阶段的战略合作伙伴关系，允许 Life360 会员直接在 Life360 应用程序内为青少年和其他家庭成员请求和协调 Uber 乘车服务。该集成使用 Uber Family 的乘车平台和安全功能以及 Life360 的实时位置共享，让家长可以向家庭成员的实时位置请求乘车，并通过 Life360 或 Uber 跟踪行程进度。该集成将于 6 月 18 日在特定市场向 Life360 会员上线。

6 月 17 日，Rothschild & Co Redburn 将 Uber 的目标股价从 120 美元下调至 112 美元，并维持买入评级。 Rothschild & Co Redburn 表示，自动驾驶汽车将推动网约车平台总体市场的“大幅扩张”。该公司表示，Uber 和 Lyft 的定位是“仍然是网约车需求的聚合者”，同时也为分散的自动驾驶汽车供应商提供商业和运营能力。 Rothschild & Co Redburn 也认为 Uber 股票目前的水平具有“令人信服的价值”。

Uber Technologies, Inc.（纽约证券交易所股票代码：UBER）在美国、加拿大、拉丁美洲、欧洲、中东、非洲和亚太地区开发和运营专有技术应用程序。

虽然我们承认优步作为一项投资的潜力，但我们相信某些人工智能股票具有更大的上涨潜力，并且下行风险较小。如果您正在寻找一只被极度低估的人工智能股票，并且该股票也将从特朗普时代的关税和离岸趋势中受益匪浅，请参阅我们关于最佳短期人工智能股票的免费报告。
